feature: trust-blend ranking (Wave-0 confidence + evidenceClass fold into rankScore)

feature: deterministic walk-order reproducibility across rescans (content-derived stable key tie-breaking in rankContextEdges)

feature: generation watermark freshness field (monotonic counter in metadata table from scan finalize)
